violations.text: The outside dumpster is not covered/closed. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. PIC closed door during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2026

The following were observed in poor repair: -Wall in truck/staging area (holes) -coving in dry storage (falling off). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2025

The receiving door to the outside, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023
Base for Robot Coupe Blixer was observed chipped in multiple places. Equipment to be in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023
Caulking at 3 bay sink was observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023
3 bay sink observed leaking unto floor. Plumbing systems to be maintained in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023
